title: QA ALIGN Assessment Report

executiveSummary.summary: This Playwright system is currently low trust. The recommended starting point is Sprint 3, with modernization following the no_ai path.

technicalFindings: Brittle locator strategy: Heavy use of weak text selectors and fallback CSS.
Rerun-dependent debugging: Artifacts are incomplete, failures often rerun to understand.
Shared mutable state: Tests depend on prior execution order.
roadmap: Start with Sprint 3 for artifact-first diagnosability.
Move to Sprint 4 to classify and reduce flake patterns.
Use Sprint 5 to restore state and data control.
Adopt Sprint 6 once the signal is stable enough to support clearer release decisions.
nextSteps: Run a technical signal review against the current framework implementation.
Validate trust level with real anti-pattern evidence.
Confirm the no_ai path as the appropriate first modernization route.
